Description: New user successfully registers with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Fill first_name with valid name
2. Fill last_name with valid name
3. Fill email with valid email format
4. Fill password with 9-40 characters
5. Fill phone with 10 digits
6. Fill dob with valid date
7. Fill address with valid address
8. Fill city with valid city
9. Fill state with valid state
10. Fill country with valid country
11. Fill postcode with 5 digits
12. Click Register button
Expected Results:
1. User account is created successfully
2. Success message displayed
3. Redirected to login page
4. No validation errors

Description: Registered user successfully logs in
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email address
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Login button
Expected Results:
1. User is authenticated successfully
2. JWT token generated
3. Redirected to account page
4. No error messages

Description: User tries to register with empty fields
Test Steps:
1. Leave first_name empty
2. Leave last_name empty
3. Leave email empty
4. Leave password empty
5. Leave phone empty
6. Leave dob empty
7. Leave address empty
8. Leave city empty
9. Leave state empty
10. Leave country empty
11. Leave postcode empty
12. Click Register button
Expected Results:
1. Validation errors displayed for all empty fields
2. Form submission prevented
3. User stays on registration page
4. Specific error messages for each field

Description: User tries to register with invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Fill form with invalid email format
2. Fill other fields with valid data
3. Click Register button
Expected Results:
1. Email validation error displayed
2. Form submission prevented
3. User stays on registration page
4. Clear error message about email format

Expected Results:

Expected Results:

Description: User account gets locked after multiple failed logins
Preconditions: User has account with failed attempts
Test Steps:
1. Attempt login with wrong password
2. Repeat failed login attempts
3. Try login with correct password after lockout
4. Check lockout duration
Expected Results:
1. Account locked after failed attempts
2. Locked account error displayed
3. Cannot login even with correct password
4. Lockout expires after timeout period

Description: Malicious user tries SQL injection
Test Steps:
1. Enter SQL injection payload in email field
2. Enter SQL injection payload in password field
3. Enter SQL injection payload in name fields
4. Submit form
Expected Results:
1. Input properly sanitized
2. No SQL injection vulnerability exploited
3. Appropriate error messages displayed
4. System remains secure

4. Submit form
Expected Results:
1. Input properly sanitized

Description: Multiple users register simultaneously
Test Steps:

2. Use different email addresses
3. Use same email address
4. Check for race conditions
Expected Results:
1. No data corruption
2. Proper handling of concurrent requests
3. Appropriate error handling for duplicates
4. System performance maintained

Description: User session handling after login
Test Steps:

2. Check session timeout
3. Try to access protected pages
4. Logout and verify session cleanup
Expected Results:
1. Proper session management
2. Session timeout works correctly
3. Proper access control
4. Secure session handling

Description: Test email verification process
Test Steps:
1. Check if verification email sent
2. Click verification link
3. Verify account activation
4. Try login before verification
Expected Results:

2. Account properly verified
3. Can login after verification
4. Cannot login before verification

Description: Test password reset functionality
Test Steps:
1. Request password reset
2. Check reset email
3. Reset password
4. Login with new password
Expected Results:
1. Reset email sent
2. Password successfully reset
3. Can login with new password
4. Old password no longer works
